theme: Tactical Dark Map with Swiss Brutalist Command Panel
description: A military strategy simulator for the 'General' to protect the green zone between Cidade de Deus and Gardênia Azul. Features a dark, immersive radar-style map contrasted with a highly legible, brutalist white command panel.

rules: CRITICAL: Do not use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings. They are banned.
Use JetBrains Mono for all coordinates, operational stats, and command panel headers to enforce the military terminal feel.
Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) for large headers.
Overlines/Labels must be UPPERCASE, tiny (text-xs), and widely spaced (tracking-[0.2em]).

layout_and_grids.structure: Full-bleed absolute map (Leaflet) occupying 100% of the viewport width and height. The Command Panel (Sidebar) is a fixed overlay on the left.
layout_and_grids.command_panel: Fixed to left, w-80 or w-96, h-screen, bg-white, text-black, border-r-2 border-black, flex flex-col shadow-[8px_0_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]. The white background is a strict requirement for contrast.
layout_and_grids.tools_grid: Inside the panel, use a high-density bento grid for the drawing and placement tools: grid-cols-2 gap-4. Buttons should span 1 column, major actions span full width (col-span-full).
layout_and_grids.spacing_philosophy: Inside the white panel, use generous padding (p-6) for distinct sections. Do not cram elements. Separate sections with hard 1px black borders (border-b border-black).

visual_enhancers.radar_sweep: Add a CSS-based conic gradient animation overlay on the map container (pointer-events-none) to simulate a continuous radar sweep.
visual_enhancers.pin_pulses: Use CSS animations (animate-ping) to create a pulse ring behind active strategic pins (HQ, enemies).
visual_enhancers.surface_strategy: The white command panel uses the 'Swiss Brutalist' strategy: strict grid, hard 1px/2px borders, stark monochrome palette with pure color reserved only for tactical active states (red/blue/green).

logo.description: Suplementos Mais Baratos logo. Place prominently at the top of the command panel.

mascot.description: Muscular cartoon man. Use in the header or user profile section of the command panel as the 'General' avatar.

components.buttons: Brutalist styling. Sharp corners (rounded-none). High contrast. Default: border border-black bg-white text-black. Hover: bg-black text-white transition-colors duration-200. Active tactical tools should take on their respective colors (e.g., active enemy pin tool -> bg-red-600 text-white).
components.map: Use 'react-leaflet'. Set the TileLayer URL to a dark theme provider like CartoDB Dark Matter: 'https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png'. Center coordinates: [-22.945, -43.365].
components.icons: Use 'lucide-react'. MapPin for HQ, ShieldAlert for Allies, Skull for Enemies, Route for paths, CircleDashed for zones.
components.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='add-hq-button', data-testid='draw-route-tool').

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must invert colors on hover or show a distinct border thickening.
motion_and_interactions.tool_activation: When a map tool (like 'Draw Route' or 'Place Pin') is active, the button in the command panel must remain visually depressed or highlighted to clearly indicate state.
motion_and_interactions.map_markers: Markers should drop in with a slight bounce animation.

accessibility_and_contrast.contrast_ratio: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text. The white sidebar against black text guarantees high readability. On the dark map, all drawn lines/pins must use highly saturated colors (Pure Red, Bright Blue, Bright Yellow) to pop against the dark gray/black background.
accessibility_and_contrast.transparent_backgrounds: CRITICAL: Do not use complete transparent backgrounds for overlays or headers over the map if they contain text. Use a solid color or heavy backdrop blur with an explicit background color.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure react-leaflet and leaflet for the map visualization. Ensure Leaflet CSS is imported.
Implement a custom state manager to track pins (lat, lng, type), routes (array of lat/lng pairs), and zones (lat, lng, radius, type).
The UI is split: `<MapBackground />` (absolute, z-0) and `<CommandSidebar />` (absolute or flex layout, left-0, z-10, bg-white).
The HQ initial pin should be manually settable or pre-set at Motel Amarelinho (Av Vice Presidente José de Alencar n 1400 - approx. near the given coordinates).
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for the unique layouts of the command center rather than over-relying on pre-built Shadcn Cards, to maintain the brutalist command panel aesthetic.
Do not use generic emoji icons. Use `lucide-react` strictly.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic, 'on distribution' AI outputs. Make the interface distinctive.
Do not center-align the app container globally. Maintain structural layout reading flow.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions. Static = dead.
Exclude transforms from universal transitions (no `transition: all`).
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters (e.g., 🤖🧠💭💡) for icons.
Components MUST use named exports; Pages MUST use default exports.
Use 'sonner' for toasts if notifications are needed.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute based on their role.
